ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "reg_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "pm25" REAL /* PM2.5 concentration in the air */,
  "pm100" REAL /* PM100 concentration in the air */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "tvoc" REAL /* Total Volatile Organic Compounds (TVOC) concentration */,
  "co2" REAL /* CO2 concentration in the air */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (N, S, E, W, etc.) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "aqi" REAL /* Air Quality Index */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., air quality, weather) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next calibration */,
  "installation_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the installation (e.g., WGS84) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use of the location (e.g., residential, industrial) */,
  "nearest_major_road" TEXT /* Nearest major road to the location */,
  "nearest_water_body" TEXT /* Nearest water body to the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "agg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregation entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the raw data entry */,
  "aggregation_type" TEXT /* Type of aggregation (e.g., hourly, daily, monthly) */,
  "aggregation_value" REAL /* Aggregated value for the metric */,
  "aggregation_date" TEXT /* Date of the aggregation */,
  "aggregation_period" TEXT /* Period of aggregation (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  "aggregation_method" TEXT /* Method of aggregation (e.g., average, median) */,
  "aggregation_source" TEXT /* Source of the aggregation (e.g., raw data, processed data) */,
  "aggregation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the aggregation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high PM2.5, low temperature) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert in minutes */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_action" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "maintenance_performed_by" TEXT /* Who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily summary, monthly analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy searching */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_status_logs" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor whose status is being tracked */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "status_change_by" TEXT /* Who changed the status */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_status_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
